# IMPLEMENTATION

## Planned Changes

- Refine slug control layout.
- Improve inline validation feedback styling.

## Files Touched

- `frontend/src/routes/dashboard/projects/[projectId]/+page.svelte`

## Verification

- `npm run check` in `frontend/`

## Notes

- The final design keeps the slug prefix, input, actions, and status feedback visually grouped in one compact utility row.
- Availability feedback now uses a clearer integrated status chip with success/error/neutral coloring.
- This is a focused UI refinement.
